name: insurance brokers managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For insurance brokers managing 5–15 clients, missed policy renewal deadlines cause client dissatisfaction. We provide automated quarterly reminders instead of manual tracking of policy renewals.
features: manual entry of client policy details
